verdict: EFFECTIVE — the scraper is running effectively, not just playing around

findings.hypothesis: Scraper throughput appears low (0.25 runs/h over 39.4h)
findings.finding: Throughput during active periods is actually 2-3 runs/hour with 300-800 comments/run and 200-450 evidence items/run. The low average comes from a 25.6-hour idle gap (Jun 27 21:46 → Jun 28 23:22) when no automation was running.

Confirmed: 5/120 queries (4.2%) hit HTTP 412. Caused by running as anonymous guest (no BILIBILI_COOKIE env var). Impact is minor — 87.5% query success rate. Adding a valid Bilibili cookie would reduce these further.

findings.hypothesis: 20 exhausted terms stuck in retry loop
findings.finding: Confirmed: 20 terms have 3+ failed attempts with zero evidence gain. Root cause: DEFAULT_EXHAUSTED_SUGGESTION_TEMPLATES use generic queries like '{term} 热评' without family-specific context. Successful queries use family contexts ('争议' for evasion, '梗' for attack, '讨论' for cooperation). 6/20 exhausted terms already had evidence before harvesting — they just can't gain MORE with current queries.

All 126 evidence files contain real Bilibili comments (verified by sampling). Evidence includes actual video URLs, comment text, and source metadata. Evidence freshness: all 126 files updated Jun 29 01:44-01:46. DeepSeek training worked in early runs (Runs 0-3) then stopped being called (Runs 4-9: 0 deepseek calls) — may indicate fallback-only mode.

recommendations: Run harvest continuously (CRON or loop) to eliminate idle gaps — throughput during active periods is good
Add a Bilibili cookie (BILIBILI_COOKIE env var) to reduce HTTP 412 rate from 4.2% to near-zero
Improve DEFAULT_EXHAUSTED_SUGGESTION_TEMPLATES to include family-specific context words (争议/梗/讨论/绝对化) for better search precision on exhausted terms
Investigate why DeepSeek training stopped after Run 3 (Runs 4-9 show 0 deepseek calls) — may be intentional fallback mode or a bug
Consider increasing retryBeforeUnattemptedLimit or adding per-term attempt cap to prevent exhausted terms from consuming harvest cycles

config.symptom: recheck bilibili scraper, is it running effective or just playing around?
